description_long: This is a light-colored, cylindrical cup with two large, vertical handles symmetrically attached on opposite sides, making it easy to grip with both hands. The cup's surface is smooth and appears to be made of a semi-translucent plastic material, giving it a slightly frosted look. On one side, there is a printed illustration of a plant sprouting from a brain, accompanied by the text 'Property of Rydawydawn.' The handles are thick and rounded, extending above the rim of the cup, which suggests it is designed for stability and ease of use, possibly for children or individuals with limited dexterity. The cup has no visible lid or spout, and its interior is hollow, suitable for holding liquids. The overall design is functional, with a touch of decorative branding on one side.
description: A semi-translucent, cylindrical cup with two large vertical handles and a printed illustration with text on one side. The surface is smooth and frosted, with no lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large vertical handles and the plain, smooth surface of the cup.
description_view_1: Side view showing one handle in profile and the cylindrical body, with minimal visible decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the printed illustration and text, with both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle in profile and a mostly plain surface.
